DISCOVERY 612, PETITIONER ANTHONY GUZETTA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND INSPECTION DEMAND; AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST RESPONDENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $600, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. LATE OPPOSITION HAS BEEN CONSIDERED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR.
